userStories.title: Add task status schema
userStories.description: As a user, I want each task to store a status so that work can be tracked as pending, in progress, or done.
acceptanceCriteria: Tasks have a persisted status field with allowed values pending, in progress, and done
Existing tasks default to pending
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Update task status backend action
userStories.description: As a user, I want task status changes to persist so that updates survive reloads.
acceptanceCriteria: Updating a task status persists the selected value
Invalid status values are rejected
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show task status badge on task cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see each task status on its card so that I can scan progress quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Task cards display the current status badge
Badge reflects the stored task status
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add task status control to task rows
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change status from each task row so that I can update work inline.
acceptanceCriteria: Each task row exposes a status control
Changing the control updates the selected task status
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filter tasks by status
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter the task list by status so that I can focus on specific work states.
acceptanceCriteria: The task list can filter by status
Filter results show only tasks with the selected status
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
